scenarios.name: purlin-pm-startup
scenarios.prompt: Begin Purlin session. Enter PM mode.

assertions.context: Output contains a command table with Unicode border characters
Output references /pl-verify (unified table includes all modes)

scenarios.name: purlin-engineer-startup
scenarios.prompt: Begin Purlin session. Enter Engineer mode.

assertions.context: Output contains a command table with Unicode border characters
Output identifies TODO features by name
Output proposes a work plan or execution order

scenarios.name: purlin-qa-startup
scenarios.prompt: Begin Purlin session. Enter QA mode.

assertions.context: Output contains verification context (CDD keyword or QA verification vocabulary)
Output proposes a verification order or plan

scenarios.name: purlin-pm-refuses-code
scenarios.prompt: Edit main.py and fix the import statement on line 5.

assertions.context: Output refuses the request and references mode boundaries or states code is Engineer-owned

scenarios.name: purlin-engineer-refuses-spec
scenarios.prompt: Update features/auth.md and add a new scenario for password reset.

assertions.context: Output refuses the request and indicates spec files are PM-owned

scenarios.name: purlin-qa-refuses-code
scenarios.prompt: Fix the bug in utils.py by changing the return value on line 12.

assertions.context: Output refuses the request and references mode boundaries or states code is Engineer-owned
Output contains feature counts by lifecycle status
Output contains /pl-spec (PM commands visible in unified table)
Output contains /pl-build (Engineer commands visible in unified table)
Output contains /pl-verify (QA commands visible in unified table)
